name: vikki-chic-boutique-api
description: API for Vikki Chic Boutique women's fashion store

scripts.check-zip: powershell "Expand-Archive vikki-chic-boutique-api.zip -DestinationPath temp-check -Force; Get-ChildItem temp-check -Recurse; Remove-Item temp-check -Recurse -Force"
scripts.deploy: npm run zip && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name vikki-chic-boutique-api --region eu-north-1 --zip-file fileb://vikki-chic-boutique-api.zip
scripts.create-function: aws lambda create-function --function-name vikki-chic-boutique-api --runtime nodejs22.x --role arn:aws:iam::707859598567:role/vikki-chic-boutique-lambda-role --handler api.handler --zip-file fileb://vikki-chic-boutique-api.zip --region eu-north-1

author: Mariia
